name: Fantasy Defense
short_description: Evil woke up! Horde of an evil wizard, which is ready to seize all kingdom of Hamdar. Ahead of you is a difficult task - build a powerful defensive system and throw an evil army into Hell. 12 levels and more than 6 hours of gameplay.
detailed_description:
Early Beta Access

"Objectives of Timely Access - To collect and process feedback from players to improve the game."


About the Game

Evil woke up!
Horde of an evil wizard, which is ready to seize all kingdom of Hamdar.
Ahead of you is a difficult task - build a powerful defensive system and throw an evil army into Hell.
12 levels and more than 6 hours of gameplay. Improve towers and strength. The forces of light will win!

Survive Mode:
• In survival mode you will encounter countless troops of an evil wizard.

Features:
• Improve the tower and magic in the store.
• heroes will help you to hold back the forces of evil.
• collect crystals.
• In any location you can find hidden gold.
